creator: olle@dalnix.se
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #3)

Compiling the port isn't the issue; it's using the feature.

See the paste below where I use the sample nginx config from the modules example where it fine on 1.22 but not 1.24.

https://privatebin.dalnix.se/?c50eba2b19314fd3#WACi1XebkE3OMP7rGtpKnrb0TrkMLabJHw1pPQbE3hY=

Maybe I'm missing something obvious?

Here's the compile log, and according to this, the module is included when compiling.

https://privatebin.dalnix.se/?602adccde6e492e0#m9KtGEjgQWjo3fuBy10eJ6Z88uys5/AOuOz5EiEJMvw=
